Patient.title: Patient
Patient.description: Represents a user (patient or doctor) on the Mediconnect platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user, matching their Auth UID.

role.description: The role of the user on the platform.

photoURL.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the user record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of when the user record was last updated.

Doctor.title: Doctor
Doctor.description: Represents a doctor's professional profile on the Mediconnect platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the doctor, matching their Auth UID.

documents.description: List of URLs to uploaded professional documents/degrees.

verified.description: Indicates if the doctor's profile has been verified by an admin.

isActive.description: Indicates if the doctor's account is active and visible to patients.

photoURL.description: URL of the doctor's profile picture.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the doctor record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of when the doctor record was last updated.

Appointment.title: Appointment
Appointment.description: Represents an appointment booked between a patient and a doctor.

patientId.description: Reference to Patient (user UID). (Relationship: Patient 1:N Appointment)

doctorId.description: Reference to Doctor (user UID). (Relationship: Doctor 1:N Appointment)

appointmentDateTime.description: Date and time of the appointment.

appointmentType.description: Type of appointment (e.g., chat, audio, video).

status.description: Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, cancelled).

diagnosis.description: The diagnosis provided by the doctor.

prescription.description: The prescription details provided by the doctor.

amount.description: The amount paid for the appointment.

paymentReceiptUrl.description: URL or Data URI of the uploaded payment receipt image.

paymentStatus.description: Status of the payment for the appointment.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the appointment record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of when the appointment record was last updated.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.description: Represents a contact form submission from a user.

message.description: The message content from the user.

submittedAt.description: Timestamp of when the contact form was submitted.

definition.description: Stores user profiles for both patients and doctors. Only the authenticated user with the matching `patientId` (their UID) or an admin can access their own document.

params.name: patientId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user, matching their auth UID.

definition.description: Stores professional doctor profiles. Only an admin can manage these profiles. All authenticated users can read doctor profiles to find suitable healthcare providers.

params.name: doctorId
params.description: The unique identifier for the doctor, matching their auth UID.

definition.description: Stores appointment records. Patients and Doctors have read access to the records where their UID is present. Admins can read all appointments. Includes `patientId` and `doctorId` within the document to enforce authorization independence.

params.name: appointmentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the appointment.

definition.description: Stores contact form submissions from users. Writable by anyone, but readable only by admins to protect user privacy.

params.name: contactId
params.description: The unique identifier for the contact submission.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore data structure is designed to support Mediconnect's core features with role-based access.
